mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WATCHLIST (member_id, stock_code, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{stockCode}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC

SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.stock_code = #{stockCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.watchlist_id = #{watchlistId}

SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND s.country = #{country} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC

SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND s.market_type = #{marketType} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC

SELECT w.watchlist_id, w.member_id, w.stock_code, w.created_at, s.stock_name, s.current_price, s.market_type, s.country, s.change_rate, s.price_change, s.volume FROM WATCHLIST w LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WATCHLIST WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WATCHLIST WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WATCHLIST WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
